notes: 32-way CMP (cellular multiprocessor) server; Windows 2000 Datacenter-certified; first shipped 2000 per Unisys history
Enterprise OS supporting up to 32-way SMP; end of support June 2010
32-bit x86 symmetric multiprocessing; predecessor to IA-64 and x86-64
Practice of consolidating distributed servers onto fewer large machines; precursor to virtualization and cloud
